name: free2aitools
description: Structured discovery, evidence, and identity layer for AI agents. Returns FNI-ranked catalog data and evidence to reason over. Does not perform compatibility analysis, execute/plan/recommend workflows, decide on the caller's behalf, or currently provide live semantic/ANN ranking.

tools.name: free2aitools_search
tools.description: Search AI models, tools, datasets, and papers by keyword. Returns FNI-ranked results.

tools.name: free2aitools_rank
tools.description: Keyword-search AI entities using the task text as query input. Returns FNI-ranked catalog entries. Does not perform task-fit recommendation or compatibility analysis.

task.description: The task to rank tools for

tools.name: free2aitools_explain
tools.description: Explain an entity's FNI score with factor breakdown (Semantic, Authority, Popularity, Recency, Quality).

tools.name: free2aitools_select_model
tools.description: Filter the Free2AITools catalog by declared metadata and return FNI-ranked entries. Constraints are metadata/heuristic filters, not verified compatibility analysis. The caller is responsible for final model selection.

ollama_compatible.description: Heuristic filter on stored metadata (GGUF indicators); does not verify actual Ollama runtime compatibility

can_run_local.description: Heuristic filter on stored metadata (model size, GGUF indicators); does not verify actual runtime compatibility on the caller's hardware or framework

explain.description: Include per-entry FNI factor summary text and caveats in the response

tools.name: free2aitools_compare
tools.description: Compare 2-25 AI models side-by-side with FNI factor decomposition and specs. Cold upper-range multi-paper requests may return a transient 503 (retry after the indicated delay).
